creator: borisboris@gmx.net
text: Maybe that's an issue. I addressed it with sendbug command under OpenBSD Guest. It's working under all other OSes I tried. So no MSI support could be the answer. PS: Should not be part of a bugreport. But bless bhyve. Together with bhyve-vm it's so much better and easier than a lot of other stuff I tried :)
